info.title: Vector Trial Governance Navigator Action
info.description: Backend implemented (backend/app.py, FastAPI + Anthropic), exposed publicly via a cloudflared quick tunnel so the hosted ChatGPT GPT's Actions can reach it. NOTE: cloudflared quick tunnels (no Cloudflare account) generate a NEW random URL every time they restart — re-paste servers[0].url here and in the GPT's Actions config whenever the tunnel is restarted. For a stable URL, use a named Cloudflare Tunnel (needs a free Cloudflare account) or deploy to Render/HF Spaces instead.

NavigatorSecret.name: X-Navigator-Secret
NavigatorSecret.description: Must match backend/.env's NAVIGATOR_SHARED_SECRET. In the ChatGPT builder's Actions authentication config, choose 'API Key', type 'Custom', header name 'X-Navigator-Secret', and paste the same secret value.

mechanism.description: Whether the product's mechanism is closer to a pesticide-active-ingredient framing (historically EPA jurisdiction, mirrors MosquitoMate/OX5034) or a drug/administered-to-the-organism framing (historically pulled toward FDA first, mirrors OX513A's 2011-2016 path).

productType.description: Suppression systems (RIDL, Wolbachia-CI) have historical precedent in both case studies. Self-propagating gene-drive systems raise an open reversibility/governance question that neither historical case study actually tested.

enum: Informational meeting only (no stated decision role)
engagement.description: The planned public-engagement design. 'Informational meeting only' mirrors the Florida Keys MCD 2012/2014 town halls that were mistaken for a decision-input channel. 'Representative survey / deliberative poll' mirrors the paper's untested-but-recommended alternative.

opposition.description: Anticipated local opposition signal, 0-100%, as a stand-in for how newsworthy/contested the trial is likely to become locally.

timelineYears.description: Historical-pattern estimate of years to a usable field-trial authorization.

factors.description: Named risk-factor contributions (0-1 each) driving the controversy-risk score.

nearestPrecedent.description: Which historical case (Oxitec/OX513A or MosquitoMate/Debug Fresno) this input combination most resembles.

table.description: Detail rows for the matched precedent case.

history.description: Prior turns in the conversation, oldest first.

post.summary: Estimate the nearest historical regulatory pathway, timeline, and public-engagement controversy risk for a proposed US GE/GD mosquito field trial, based on the Oxitec/MosquitoMate 2009-2020 precedent record.
Free-text conversational question, answered grounded in the same knowledge distillate as the GPT's own instructions.
